summary: Iteration 26 - PracticeDetailPage Refinement Pass Testing Complete. All 12 features tested successfully. Verified: (1) Login with admin@aic.it / Admin123! works. (2) Draft practice 98cf9182 shows understanding gate with 'Inizia la pratica' button. (3) Escalated practice d9c4fca6 shows progress bar with green checks for completed steps (Comprendi, Carica) and red X for blocked step (Elabora). (4) Escalated practice shows 'RICHIEDE LA TUA AZIONE' label with eye icon in guidance card. (5) Guidance card shows 'COSA FARE' box with white background containing next action text. (6) Official Step card shows 'CHI AGISCE ORA: Tu' with prominent amber badge and eye icon. (7) Official Step card shows 'Credenziali personali richieste (es. SPID)'. (8) Current agent card shows bot icon with colored background matching status (emerald for completed). (9) Timeline shows Italian labels (capitalized, properly translated from raw codes). (10) Delegation section shows active state with 'Assistenza' level and scope labels. (11) Documents section shows missing docs with 'Da caricare' and 'Richiesto' labels. (12) Blocker cards show 'Escalation attiva' (red/high) and 'Documenti mancanti' (amber/medium) with severity colors.
critical_code_review_comments: Progress bar correctly handles blocked practices (stepIdx=-1) by showing completed steps with green checks and blocked step with red X
Guidance card 'COSA FARE' box uses white/60 background with border for clear next action visibility
'CHI AGISCE ORA' badge in Official Step card is now a full-width amber/emerald card element with icon
Timeline labels properly translated from raw codes (guard_completed -> Protezione Completato, routing_completed -> Routing Completato, etc.)
Current agent card shows bot icon with colored background matching status (blue for in_progress, emerald for completed, amber for waiting)
Delegation section correctly shows active state with level label (Assistenza), scope labels, and tracking note
Documents section correctly shows missing docs with 'Da caricare' count and 'Richiesto' badge on each item
Blocker cards correctly display severity-based styling (red for high severity escalation, amber for medium severity missing docs)
seed_data_creation: Used existing practices: 98cf9182-e7df-4b73-a2e4-1c69775e7caa (draft vat_registration), d9c4fca6-a27d-4f97-a006-d191505549f9 (escalated with delegation active, 12 agent logs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested the PracticeDetailPage refinement pass. All refinements working correctly: (1) Progress bar handles blocked practices by showing completed steps with green checks and blocked step with red X. (2) Guidance card has 'COSA FARE' box with white background for next action. (3) 'CHI AGISCE ORA' badge is now a large prominent card element. (4) Timeline labels are properly translated to Italian (capitalized). (5) Current agent card shows bot icon with colored background. (6) Delegation section shows active state with scope labels. (7) Documents section shows missing docs with 'Da caricare' and 'Richiesto' labels. (8) Blocker cards show severity-based styling. Test practices: 98cf9182 (draft), d9c4fca6 (escalated with delegation).
